productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Printed Red Tshirts
description: CompositionRed T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a V-neck, short sleeves and graphic print on the frontFittingSlimWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron do not iron directly on print/embroideryThis T-shirt from united colors of benetton pays tribute to the modern youth with its tongue-in-cheek humour. Turning conventional style on its head while keeping it in the spotlight, this tee is every fashion maven's must-have. Pair this with distressed jeans and branded flip flops to come off as the urbane funny man. Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
